problem id: 89906f16
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  01100001 -> 00001111
  01110100 -> 10100111
  11011001 -> 11001111
  10110111 -> 10111111
  11110110 -> 10111111
  10001010 -> 01011100
  00111001 -> 11001011
  10100101 -> 00101111
  11000010 -> 00011110

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 00000011
